title: 9 Signs the Spirit Is Building Self-Control in You
caption:
Self-control that comes from gritting your teeth burns out by Thursday. This is a different kind.

Galatians lists it as fruit, not a personality trait you either have or don't. Fruit grows. It's not something you manufacture by trying harder, it's something that shows up in you as the Spirit does His work.

You'll know it's real and not just willpower because it doesn't announce itself. You just notice one day that the urge didn't shock you, that silence didn't send you for your phone, that you kept the promise nobody was checking on.

"But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, self-control." — Galatians 5:22-23

Here are 9 signs it's actually taking root.

Save this and check yourself against it in a month.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #galatians #scripture #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
